T0361.title: Money Mule
T0361.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“提篮子”指利用关系网替赌场或涉赌团伙收转非法资金、摆平外围麻烦的中间人。
T0361.description: This role typically does not involve direct participation in gambling. Instead, the individual uses their connections to provide cover for the movement of gambling funds, transferring cash, money laundering proceeds, or cryptocurrency from gamblers to organizers while evading risk controls and law enforcement. These middlemen often have ties to local power structures or insiders, serving as both a financial conduit and a relationship buffer. If an operation is compromised, the middleman becomes a critical point of failure for cutting off the money flow.
